mainEntity.name: What if occupational illness worsens after settlement in North Salt Lake?
mainEntity.text: What if occupational illness worsens after settlement in North Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: Reopen North Salt Lake settlements within 5 years for worsened condition via new evidence.[5]

suggestedAnswer.text: Petition shows progression; new IMR required. Bountiful cases reopen for disease advancement. Beware finality clauses.[5]
